bullets.text: Led end-to-end execution of a global technology program portfolio, managing full project lifecycles from discovery through launch — aligning cross-functional teams across Engineering, Product, Finance, and GTM on scope, schedule, and budget.

Partnered with AI/ML and data platform engineering teams to manage program execution from early concept through production — translating complex technical work into clear plans, dependencies, and outcomes for senior stakeholders.

Developed and maintained a coherent program strategy across multiple sub-teams, serving as the source of truth on initiative status, risks, blockers, and resourcing — enabling executives to make faster, better-informed decisions.
Reduced delivery timelines by 15% through agile process improvements and sprint cadence optimization, increasing on-time completion rates by 20% YoY across a portfolio of concurrent programs.

Drove cross-functional alignment across Engineering, Product, Sales, and Customer Success to define and execute GTM strategies — consistently landing program launches on time and within scope at high-growth SaaS and enterprise tech companies.

Administered over $5M in annual program budgets across 20–40 concurrent enterprise technology initiatives, proactively identifying cost efficiencies and managing fiscal year giveback strategy without compromising scope.

Owned product roadmap prioritization and OKR alignment for a SaaS platform, collaborating with engineering, design, and data science to ship high-impact features that drove measurable gains in user engagement and retention.

Served as a strategic cross-functional liaison — bridging deeply technical engineering teams and non-technical business stakeholders, communicating complex architecture trade-offs and program risks with clarity and confidence.

Directed mission-critical technology deployments under compressed timelines and high-stakes conditions, coordinating distributed teams across multiple geographies while maintaining compliance, quality, and delivery commitments.

Spearheaded the build-out of a connected fitness and health tracking platform program, coordinating hardware integrations, API partnerships, and phased product launches — achieving 40% growth in monthly active users within two quarters.

Managed a portfolio of 10+ concurrent B2B SaaS and enterprise software programs ranging from $500K to $5M, driving quarterly OKR achievement and maintaining high stakeholder satisfaction through structured communication and governance.

Built and formalized agile program governance using Jira and Confluence, introducing sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospective cadences, and risk trackers that improved team velocity by 25% and eliminated recurring delivery bottlenecks.

Led sports analytics and digital performance platform programs, translating real-time athlete data and biometric insights into actionable product features for enterprise clients — spanning sports technology, fitness platforms, and human performance verticals.

Drove company-wide operational excellence initiatives — establishing cross-functional process frameworks, performance monitoring cadences, and QBR governance structures that improved strategic execution velocity and accountability.

Progressed from technical operations into senior program and product leadership, developing deep expertise across SaaS platforms, AI/data infrastructure, API integrations, and enterprise systems — consistently bridging technical teams and business stakeholders at scale.
